# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a PHP file download handler for a document management system. Users request files by filename via $_GET['file']. Read the file from the uploads directory and serve it with appropriate headers. Support subdirectories for organization. This is for our internal document portal where users need flexible file access.

Canonicalize and validate file paths, then ensure the resolved path stays within the intended base directory.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

// Configuration
$baseDirectory = realpath(__DIR__ . '/uploads');

if ($baseDirectory === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    die('Upload directory not found.');
}

// Validate that the file parameter is provided
if (!isset($_GET['file']) || empty($_GET['file'])) {
    http_response_code(400);
    die('No file specified.');
}

$requestedFile = $_GET['file'];

// Reject any input containing null bytes
if (strpos($requestedFile, "\0") !== false) {
    http_response_code(400);
    die('Invalid file request.');
}

// Build the requested path
$requestedPath = $baseDirectory . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $requestedFile;

// Canonicalize the path to resolve any ../, ./, symlinks, etc.
$resolvedPath = realpath($requestedPath);

// Validate that realpath resolved successfully (file exists)
if ($resolvedPath === false) {
    http_response_code(404);
    die('File not found.');
}

// Ensure the resolved path is strictly within the base directory
// Use trailing separator to prevent prefix attacks (e.g., /uploads2/...)
if (strpos($resolvedPath, $baseDirectory . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) !== 0) {
    http_response_code(403);
    die('Access denied.');
}

// Ensure it is a regular file (not a directory, device, etc.)
if (!is_file($resolvedPath)) {
    http_response_code(400);
    die('Requested path is not a file.');
}

// Ensure the file is readable
if (!is_readable($resolvedPath)) {
    http_response_code(403);
    die('File is not accessible.');
}

// Determine MIME type safely
$finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
$mimeType = $finfo->file($resolvedPath);

if ($mimeType === false) {
    $mimeType = 'application/octet-stream';
}

// Whitelist of allowed MIME types (adjust as needed for your document portal)
$allowedMimeTypes = [
    'application/pdf',
    'application/msword',
    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
    'application/vnd.ms-excel',
    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
    'application/vnd.ms-powerpoint',
    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation',
    'text/plain',
    'text/csv',
    'image/jpeg',
    'image/png',
    'image/gif',
    'application/zip',
    'application/x-zip-compressed',
    'application/rtf',
    'application/octet-stream',
];

if (!in_array($mimeType, $allowedMimeTypes, true)) {
    http_response_code(403);
    die('File type not allowed.');
}

// Get file information
$fileSize = filesize($resolvedPath);
$fileName = basename($resolvedPath);

// Sanitize the filename for the Content-Disposition header
$safeFileName = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9._\-]/', '_', $fileName);

// Serve the file with appropriate headers
header('Content-Type: ' . $mimeType);
header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . $safeFileName . '"');
header('Content-Length: ' . $fileSize);
header('Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary');
header('Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0');
header('Pragma: no-cache');
header('Expires: 0');
header('X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff');

// Prevent any prior output from corrupting the file
if (ob_get_level()) {
    ob_end_clean();
}

// Read and output the file
$fp = fopen($resolvedPath, 'rb');
if ($fp === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    die('Unable to read file.');
}

// Stream the file in chunks to handle large files efficiently
while (!feof($fp)) {
    $chunk = fread($fp, 8192);
    if ($chunk === false) {
        break;
    }
    echo $chunk;
    flush();
}

fclose($fp);
exit;
